Asuer PDF skill — install (no GitHub required)

macOS:
  1. Double-click "install.command".
     First time only: if macOS blocks it, right-click the file, choose Open,
     then click Open again in the dialog.
  2. Quit and reopen Claude Code.
  3. Ask Claude to make any document or PDF — a policy, letter, memo, minutes
     or spec. It comes out on the Asuer letterhead automatically.

Terminal / Linux:
  Run:  bash install.sh

Requirements on your machine:
  - Google Chrome (or Chromium) installed
  - Node.js 22 or newer (https://nodejs.org)
  - Internet the first time it renders (for the Poppins font)

Nothing else. No GitHub, no marketplace, no account.
